description: Boost: hotfixes the Comments UI default-flow issue so the duplicate native Comments title row is removed when patching through the normal Morphe Manager/default flow. Preserves Boost's toolbar title, dynamic sort subtitle and dark theme. Carries forward the 1.4.40 Boost media tap-action settings, deleted gallery metadata restore improvements, safer subreddit listing fallback handling, Android 15+/target SDK 35 compatibility, notification fixes and Imgur selected media sharing patches. 16K/WL04R work remains deferred.
